name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement

## Feature Summary
<!-- One sentence: what should this do? -->

## Problem It Solves
<!-- What user need or pain point does this address? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature. Include UI mockups, API changes, or DB schema if relevant. -->

## Affected Layers
- [ ] Backend (Spring Boot service/controller)
- [ ] Frontend (Next.js page/component)
- [ ] Database (new Flyway migration)
- [ ] Real-time (WebSocket / Notification)
- [ ] Payment (Stripe)
- [ ] Email (Brevo)
- [ ] Scheduled job

## Affected Roles
- [ ] Guest
- [ ] Traveler
- [ ] Guide
- [ ] Admin

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out -->
